artifacts.description: Aggregate artifact metadata entries keyed outside the artifact contract by producer step id. Items must be { producerStepId, artifact }, where artifact follows the central artifact metadata contract.

attempts.description: Interpreter-owned retry counters keyed by workflow edge.

outputs.description: Legacy mirror of validated structured per-step worker outputs keyed by step id.

^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_-]*$.description: Per-step worker output keyed by workflow step id for downstream input.state projection.

user_prompt.description: Raw run-level startup user prompt captured when the workflow run is initialized. Immutable after start/resume.

user_prompt_injected.description: Interpreter/runner marker set after the selected startup-prompt worker output has been applied. Prevents reinjection after completion/resume or workflow drift while allowing repeated renders of the same uncompleted worker to preserve the prompt.

user_prompt_target.description: Interpreter-owned selected startup worker step id that receives baton.user_prompt before any worker output exists. Stable across resume and workflow order drift.

id.description: Artifact id unique within the producer step.
id.x-usage: Use with the projected producer step id to identify the artifact. Emit a stable id unique within the producer step; do not add producer_step_id, type, kind, ref, version, replaces, or aliases.

content_type.description: MIME/content type, for example text/markdown or application/json.
content_type.x-usage: Use to render or parse the artifact content. Do not duplicate artifact meaning with type or kind fields.

path.description: Optional run-relative artifact file path. Current local artifacts conventionally use <stepId>/artifacts/<artifactId>... under the run directory.
path.x-usage: When the artifact is persisted as a run file, emit the run-relative path and treat it as the artifact file location. Do not rewrite it unless producing a new artifact.

summary.description: Optional compact handoff summary for the artifact.
summary.x-usage: Use as orientation metadata only; the artifact content remains the source of truth for review or approval.

producerStepId.description: Producer step id used only for aggregate identity; not part of the artifact metadata contract.
